definitions.text: Of or belonging to the species Homo sapiens or its closest relatives.
Having the nature or attributes of a human being.
examples: To err is human; to forgive, divine.
She's only human, so give her a break!

definitions.text: A highly intelligent ape with fine and short body hair; the most abundant species of primate, with members found on every continent (Homo sapiens).
examples: Humans share common ancestors with other apes.

definitions.text: A human as contrasted from superficially similar but typically more powerful humanoid creatures; a member of the human race.
To behave as or become, or to cause to behave as or become, a human.
